title: ficus cotinifolia subsp. myxifolia
intro: Ficus cotinifolia subsp. myxifolia, also known as the Pagoda tree or Pagoda fig, is a species of fig tree native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ficus cotinifolia subsp. myxifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
